formula_checks.note: Uses actual race-by-race payouts from JRA official DB, not averaged estimates
Estimated from tansho odds. Overestimates actual payouts by ~2x. Used only for comparison, NOT for final ROI.
Uses average return per hit from backtest results, not theoretical estimates

detail: Each test year (2020-2025) uses model trained on all prior data
For each race: AI ranks horses, generates bet combinations
Trio: TOP1-axis, TOP2,3 second, TOP2-6 third = 7 combinations
Each combination checked against JRA official results
Payout = JRA official amount (100-yen basis, multiplied by bet unit)
Investment = fixed 700 yen per race (regardless of outcome)
purchase_basis.note: ROI is calculated from individual race outcomes, NOT from averaged statistics. Each race contributes its actual payout (or 0 if miss) to the total.
